content: @Miguel Ojeda this is what I was thinking of https://lore.kernel.org/lkml/20240228225527.1052240-1-helen.koike@collabora.com/. But it's just for running CI, I was thinking it did something like turn patches into MRs for organization.
And it looks like it kind of tapered off
@Trevor Gross what do you mean with tapered off?
I just didn't see a v2 after that. But maybe I wasn't clear on the intent - was it just sharing the DRM flow, not expected to merge?
@Trevor Gross Helen is my colleague. She said she hasn't had the time to work on this recently. FYI.
Oh that's convenient, thanks for the update. It sounds very cool, but also pretty huge so totally understandable
Was/is the plan to get it actually merged into mainline?
